name: FB Post: Anti-Dynasty Provision - 38 Years Undefined
markdown_description:
## Hook
Article II, Section 26 of the 1987 Constitution bans political dynasties. Congress has spent 38 years refusing to define what one is.

## Core argument (2-3 lines)
The 1987 Constitution wrote the cure (Article II, Section 26: prohibit political dynasties as may be defined by law). Every Congress since has filed an anti-dynasty bill and let it die in committees chaired by dynasts. This week's news cycle (Sandiganbayan arrest warrant + same-day bail for Sen. Jinggoy Estrada in the P573M flood-control plunder case; VP Sara Duterte impeachment answer due June 1, trial July 6) is what 38 years of legislative non-action produces. The refusal IS the policy.

## Constitutional citation
Article II, Section 26: "The State shall guarantee equal access to opportunities for public service, and prohibit political dynasties as may be defined by law."
